title: Ex-FBI Director Comey indicted again, in a probe over an online post officials call a Trump threat
summary: Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted again, this time over a social media photo of seashells arranged on a beach that officials say constituted a threat against President Donald Trump.

title: Trump and Charles greet each other warmly and meet in Oval Office on a day of diplomacy for the king
summary: Under gray, drizzly skies, Trump welcomed Charles and Queen Camilla to the White House in a ceremony on the South Lawn, with the president quipping that it was a “beautiful British day.”

title: Ex-NBA player Damon Jones is 1st to plead guilty in gambling sweep that led to over 30 arrests
summary: During back-to-back hearings in Brooklyn federal court, Jones entered guilty pleas to two counts of conspiracy to commit wire fraud for his role in what prosecutors say were sports betting and rigged poker game schemes.

title: Taylor Swift files 3 new trademark applications. One expert says it is to curb AI threats
